content:
This tab is of a compelling artist of the soul, I haven't seen much of her stuff
on tab sites, which is sad and which means were missing something....SOUL
EXPRESSION children, SOUL EVOLUTION!! 

[Verse]

from you, it's true, oh yes they do---ooh, ooh[/tab]
